title: Mobs More Dangerous
description: This makes GROUPS of Mobs more dangerous.
body:
This datapack makes Groups of Mobs more dangerous.
For example: three or more Zombies will apply Debuffs on the player hit. They are also stronger and tankier.
Skeletons, Pillagers, and Piglin(ranged) will also apply debuffs.
Vindicator, Zombie, Piglins and Brutes, are tankier and stronger.
Creepers will deal extra damage (2 creepers instead of 3)

When mobs are killed (Group goes down below 3), the buffs are removed. (This may change in the future.)
